mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_RESPONSE ( FORM_UUID, PARENT_SN, PARENT_TYPE, USER_SN, RSPNS_CN, RSPNS_DT, DEL_YN, VIEW_CNT ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{dto.parentSn}, #{dto.parentType}, #{dto.userSn}, #{dto.response}, NOW(), FALSE, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT RSPNS_SN AS rspnsSn, PARENT_TYPE AS parentType, PARENT_SN AS parentSn, USER_SN AS userSn, RSPNS_DT AS rspnsDt, RSPNS_CN AS rspnsCn, VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, DEL_YN AS delYn FROM TB_RESPONSE WHERE PARENT_SN = #{parentSn} AND USER_SN = #{userSn} AND DEL_YN = FALSE
SELECT RSPNS_SN, PARENT_TYPE, PARENT_SN, USER_SN, RSPNS_DT, RSPNS_CN, VIEW_CNT, DEL_YN FROM TB_RESPONSE WHERE PARENT_SN = #{parentSn} AND USER_SN = #{userSn} AND DEL_YN = FALSE ORDER BY RSPNS_DT DESC
SELECT RSPNS_SN, PARENT_TYPE, PARENT_SN, USER_SN, RSPNS_DT, RSPNS_CN, VIEW_CNT, DEL_YN FROM TB_RESPONSE WHERE RSPNS_SN = #{rspnsSn}

SELECT R.RSPNS_SN, R.PARENT_TYPE, R.PARENT_SN, R.USER_SN, U.USER_NM AS userName, R.RSPNS_DT, R.RSPNS_CN, R.VIEW_CNT, R.DEL_YN FROM TB_RESPONSE R LEFT JOIN TB_USER U ON R.USER_SN = U.USER_SN WHERE R.PARENT_SN = #{parentSn} AND R.DEL_YN = FALSE ORDER BY R.RSPNS_DT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_RESPONSE SET DEL_YN = TRUE, RSPNS_DT = NOW() WHERE RSPNS_SN = #{rspnsSn} AND (USER_SN = #{userSn} OR #{userSn} IS NULL)
